samples.gvd:
module width_8to16 (
    input 				   clk,
    input 				   rst_n,
    input				      valid_in,
    input	   [7:0]		   data_in,
    output	reg			valid_out,
    output   reg [15:0]	data_out
);

reg [7:0] data_lock;
reg flag;

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        data_out <= 0;
        valid_out <= 0;
    end
    else begin
        if (flag && valid_in) begin
            data_out <= {data_lock, data_in};
            valid_out <= 1;
        end
        else begin
            valid_out <= 0;
        end
    end
end

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        flag <= 0;
    end
    else begin
        if (valid_in) begin
            flag <= ~flag;
        end
    end
end

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        data_lock <= 0;
    end
    else begin
        if (valid_in && !flag) begin
            data_lock <= data_in;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>data width convertion from 8 to 16</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">clock</input>
        <input id="rst_n">active low reset</input>
        <input id="valid_in">valid input</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data</input>
        <output id="valid_out">valid output</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // TODO: implement your solution here
        
        reg [15:0] data_out;
        reg [7:0] data_lock;
        reg flag;
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                data_out <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (flag && valid_in) begin
                    data_out <= {data_lock,data_in};
                end
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                flag <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (valid_in) begin
                    flag <= ~flag;
                end
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                data_lock <= 0;
            end else begin
                if (valid_in && !flag) begin
                    data_lock <= data_in;
                end
            end
        end
        
        assign valid_out = flag & valid_in;
        assign data_out = data_out;
    </implementation>
</module>
